Hey, welcome back. Now, I know that might have kind of seemed a bit weird to you, but I promise you that it's definitely worth it. From my point, I don't really care how I look. I mean, I'd rather look weird and uncool and be rich and successful than look suave and cool and be broke and desperate. See, my point, it's pretty much on target. Anyway, the key to success with this process is just to keep practicing it. You practice every day and you start using it when you're out selling in the field or on the phone. Trust me, you'll get easier and easier over time. Ultimately, you'll be at that point where it will basically be second nature to you. Also, don't forget to go into those critical incident scenarios. They're crucial in helping you drive things in deeper so they eventually become part of you. Go through them now and then practice, practice, practice, and I promise you, your results in the field will literally swar. We'll talk again soon.
